---
title: "15-sentiment"
---

```{r}
#library(tidyverse)
#library(tidytext) # functions for doing text analysis
```

# Load the Data

Random (?) sample of 26,882 reviews of coursera courses (Source: [Kaggle](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/septa97/100k-courseras-course-reviews-dataset/data))

```{r}
#en_coursera_reviews <- read_csv("https://stat220-w26.github.io/data/en_coursera_sample.csv")
#en_coursera_reviews
```

# Load Sentiment data

## "bing"

```{r}
#bing_sentiments = get_sentiments("bing") %>%
#  slice_sample(n = 20)
```

## "afinn"

```{r}
#library(textdata)
#get_sentiments("afinn") %>%
#  slice_sample(n = 20)
```

# Sentiment of each review

```{r}
#bing_review_scores <- en_coursera_reviews %>%
#  unnest_tokens(word, Review) %>% 
#  inner_join(bing_sentiments, by = "word") %>%
#  group_by(review_id) %>%
#  summarize(
#    sum = (sum(sentiment == "positive") - sum(sentiment == "negative"))
#  )

#bing_review_scores
```
